fields.label: Series
fields.description: Auto-generated document number. Format: PROD-LOG-YYYY-MM-DD-####. Do not change the series unless instructed by the system administrator.

fields.label: Production Date
fields.description: The calendar date this log covers. Defaults to today. One log is allowed per date + shift combination — a duplicate will be rejected on save.

fields.label: Shift
fields.description: Day = morning/afternoon shift  |  Night = overnight shift. Only one log per shift per date is allowed.

fields.label: Production Manager
fields.description: The supervisor or manager responsible for this shift. Select from the list of system users.

fields.label: Department
fields.description: The department this log belongs to (e.g. Production, Converting). Used for filtering and reporting.

fields.label: Status
fields.description: Automatically managed. Draft = editable  |  Submitted = locked and counted in reports  |  Cancelled = voided. Use Amend to correct a submitted log.

fields.label: Total Entries
fields.description: Auto-calculated. Total number of workstation entries in the table below.

fields.label: Production Entries
fields.description: Add one row per workstation run. Each row captures a single operator on a single workstation for this shift. A workstation may appear more than once if operators changed mid-shift.

fields.label: Summary
fields.description: Totals are recalculated automatically every time the document is saved.

fields.label: Total Reels Processed
fields.description: Sum of Number of Reels across all entries in this log.

fields.label: Total Full Reams
fields.description: Sum of all Full Reams values across every reel section in this log.

fields.label: Total Incomplete Reels
fields.description: Count of reels flagged as Incomplete Reel in this log. These reels carry forward to the next shift and appear in the Incomplete Reels Tracker report.
